stemHtml: What is one of the advantages associated with gridded forecasts compared to traditional forecast products?

options.a: These forecasts are constantly updated in real-time, and these updates may be provided to crews if their aircraft is suitably equipped to receive them.
options.b: Gridded forecasts offer NO specific advantages to pilots because a traditional forecast such as a TAF offers the same information.
options.c: Gridded forecasts can be merged in information processing systems with data from aircraft reports to provide improved situational awareness.
options.d: Gridded forecasts use less memory in a Flight Management System, allowing more rapid refreshing of the Primary Flight Display.
